description: Production incident: Several partners report missing webhook delivery events from the fictional Events API starting at 18:22 UTC. Internal monitoring shows the webhook enqueue rate is normal, but delivery success rate is lower than baseline. A deployment at 18:05 UTC changed webhook retry scheduling and signature metadata. One partner reports receiving duplicate retry attempts for older events, while newer events are delayed. Customer support is asking for a partner-facing update.
confirmed_facts: Several partners report missing webhook delivery events from the fictional Events API starting at 18:22 UTC.
Internal monitoring shows the webhook enqueue rate is normal.
Delivery success rate is lower than baseline.
A deployment at 18:05 UTC changed webhook retry scheduling and signature metadata.
One partner reports receiving duplicate retry attempts for older events.
Customer support is asking for a partner-facing update.
unknowns: The exact root cause is unknown.
The complete list of affected partners is unknown.
Whether the 18:05 UTC deployment caused the webhook delivery issue is unknown.
Whether missing webhook events were permanently lost or only delayed is unknown.
